rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks to the target component implementation
Ensure the repair does not change unrelated architecture or introduce new diagnostics
generic_rules: Use only visible identifiers in the current scope when writing AGREE contracts
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation contracts in implementation annexes
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic and stateful equations
Write guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type annexes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations, e.g., `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`
Use nested `if ... then ... else` for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not introduce new diagnostics or change unrelated architecture during repair
